name: Mimi's Mexican Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Fresh lime juice (or 1/4 cup Lemon juice)
1 boneless chicken breast, cooked and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion, garlic, and bell pepper; sauté until softened and fragrant, about several minutes.
3. Stir in chicken broth; bring to a boil.
4. Add lime or lemon juice, shredded chicken, rice, tomatoes, and cilantro. Return to a boil briefly.
5. Remove from heat immediately. Season with salt and pepper if desired.
6. Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro over the top of each bowl.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
